subject: change order to the abb transformer contract

emails.subject: Change order to the ABB transformer contract
emails.subject_base: Change order to the ABB transformer contract
emails.body: From the below, it does appear that for the PSCo project they want to make a change order to the ABB transformers. I have a call into Ben Jacoby to discuss paying in full vs obtaining consents. Regards, L Forwarded by Lisa Bills/Corp/Enron on 12/05/2000 06:08 PM Enron Global Finance From: Catherine Clark ECT 12/05/2000 11:05 AM

emails.subject: Re: Change order to the ABB transformer contract
emails.subject_base: Change order to the ABB transformer contract
emails.body: Re: Change order to the ABB transformer contract The only ABB change order I know about is the one that cancelled two transformers. It has been signed by ABB but not Enron, but it is agreed. It resulted in a cancellation charge of around $350,000, and obviously lowered the contract value. I'll get a copy and send it to you. Kay Enron North America Corp. From: Lisa Bills 12/05/2000 06:11 PM
